use_cases: Display product features on landing pages with scroll-triggered reveal animations
Showcase app capabilities in a responsive grid layout with hover interactions
Highlight service offerings with animated card scaling effects on user hover
Present feature comparisons in SaaS dashboards with spring-based animations
Create interactive product catalogs with viewport-triggered animated reveals
ai_summary: AnimatedFeatureCard is a reusable React card component designed to showcase product or service features with scroll-triggered and hover animations. Built with Framer Motion, it features spring-based entrance animations, viewport detection, and smooth scale effects on hover. The component is theme-adaptive using shadcn CSS variables, responsive with max-width constraints, and ideal for landing pages, feature grids, and product showcases across SaaS and general web applications.
